_meta.doc: Per-substrate-type defaults for the resource profile and decay behavior. Loaded by NicheGeometry builders to populate per-cell resource state. Empty in v0.1.0.

schema_fields.id: string — substrate token used in NicheCell.substrate (e.g., 'bark', 'sapwood', 'heartwood', 'water', 'litter_L')
schema_fields.default_resources: object — initial ResourceProfile field values for cells of this substrate
schema_fields.decay_pathway: string — which biochemistry runs (lignin_cellulose_decay, protein_amine_ammonia, lipid_fatty_acid, ...)
schema_fields.decay_rate_per_day: number — base rate; modulated by temperature + moisture
schema_fields.edible_by: string[] — species ids or guild tokens that can consume this substrate
